rationale: Domestic nonprofit corporation name at top of form. Domestic — uses entity.name (not entity.home_jurisdiction_name).

Name of the corporation's President in the FIRST roster table. Role-keyed officer roster (the form's row labels supply the role; the user only types name and address). Distinct from CORP_MBCA-12's officer_N.printed_name_and_capacity pattern where capacity is user-entered.
Address of the President (single-line widget — street, city, state, zip combined).
Name of the Treasurer.
Address of the Treasurer (paired with Text4 by row y-position).
Name of the Secretary.
Address of the Secretary.
Name of the Clerk.
Address of the Clerk.

Name of the first listed director. Indexed director_N.* pattern for the 3 inline director rows; 'List additional directors on reverse side' label below the table indicates overflow goes to a continuation page.
Address of the first listed director.
Name of the second listed director.
Address of the second listed director.
Name of the third listed director.
Address of the third listed director.

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] All members of the corporation entitled to vote.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=580.6); enum_select value 'members'. Shared /Btn name across pages — fill addresses the promoted kid 'Check Box16__p0' (engine.field_split).

label_verbatim: SECOND: [ ] All directors of the corporation, there being no members or no members entitled to vote.
rationale: Independent checkbox (on-state Yes) verified by geometry+text on page 0 (y=604.1); enum_select value 'directors_when_no_voting_members'.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: The address of the registered office of the corporation in the State of Maine is ____ (inline trailing blank)
rationale: Narrow trailing blank ending the FOURTH paragraph 1; the form splits the registered-office address across this trailing blank and the labeled wide line below. Same multi-line pattern as NP_MNPCA-10 merger.surviving_corp.registered_office_address_line{1,2}.

label_verbatim: FOURTH: ____ (street, city, state and zip code)
rationale: Wide labeled line below the FOURTH paragraph for the registered office address (line 2 of the two-line widget).

Date the statement is signed (top-left of page 1). Drafter originally mapped this to certification.clerk_signature; corrected here based on widget position (top-left, narrow rect at y≈731-752, on the same line as the right-side first signature block).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — first signer
rationale: First authorized officer's printed name and capacity (top-right block on page 1). Shape D (combined name+capacity).

label_verbatim: *By ____ (signature) / (type or print name and capacity) — second signer
rationale: Second authorized officer's printed name and capacity (right block, lower y). The form provides two signature slots; 13-B MRSA §104.1.B requires only one authorized officer, so the second slot is optional.

label_verbatim: MUST BE COMPLETED FOR VOTE OF MEMBERS — (signature of clerk, secretary or asst. secretary)
rationale: Inset clerk-certification block on the left of page 1: 'I certify that I have custody of the minutes showing the above action by the members.' Required only when dissolution.consent_class='members'. Same primitive as NP_MNPCA-10's merger.parties[N].clerk_certification.signer_printed_name_and_title.

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1.

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup' (standard cover-sheet boolean key; row retyped by the sweep).
Expedite tier 'expedite_24h' (standard cover-sheet boolean key; row retyped by the sweep).

Expedite tier 'immediate' (standard cover-sheet boolean key; row retyped by the sweep). Checkbox /Btn for the 'immediate_same_day' expedite tier; rect [68.7, 585.8, 90.3, 606.3] is the page-2 KID widget of AcroForm /Btn field 'Check Box16'. UPSTREAM TEMPLATE DEFECT: 'Check Box16' has two kid widgets sharing one field value -- this page-2 'immediate' box AND the page-0 SECOND 'members' box (rect [104.7,196.3]) -- so toggling one toggles the other. Bound by rect; the prior '(unnamed widget...)' id did not resolve by name (and there is no 'Check Box13' in this form).
Total fees ($10 base per page-0 header).
Contact name.
Contact phone.
